eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 5:23 AM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 1:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix Police Department is looking for Kathleen Carr female, 5 foot 5 inches tall, 122 pounds, brown eyes, brown hair, unknown clothing.  Last seen driving a black 2004 GMC Sierra pickup AZ 700NMS.

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
